title: rhamnus myrtifolia subsp. iranzoi
intro: Rhamnus myrtifolia subsp. iranzoi, also known as the Iranian buckthorn, is a plant species that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Rhamnus myrtifolia subsp. iranzoi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies.
